title: 3Q25 Recap - Only Constant is Change
summary:
Main
Image reference: RGB_COLOR_BRS_SHIPBROKERS_MONOGRAM_LOGO.png | assets/2025-10-17_3q25-recap-only-constant-is-change_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_c365f35f1de5.png
Tariffs - It's Just the Beginning? While recent deals with the US brought some clarity ahead of the August deadline, 2026 will be the first full year when most countries outside the US face tariffs on exports to the American market. The implications for dry bulk are significant.
